info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: daSanam = draMzwAvyApAraH  hanumUlagatA: sTUladantAH daMzwrAH  tadvyApAraH tatkriyAdirUpa ityarTaH ' iti bAlamanoramA  ' daMSane daSatIti syAt tatra daMSayate Rici  BAzaRe daMSayet ' ( Slo. 164 - 165 ) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'vyAGrIva ca haret putrAn sandaSenna ca pIqayet' (SikzA) daSanErgfhRIyAt
avadaMSaH tiktarasaM yojyamucyate yena Buktena tarza upajAyate
'nirdaSya daSanEScApi kroDAtsvaradanacCadam' (BA0 BIzma0 4642) nirdaSya=avaKaRqya atra niriti sAkalyaM nAha yaTA'nyatra AdaSyeti pAWAntaram
'ozWavidrumadalAnyamocayannirdaSanyuDi ruzA nijADaram' (sA0 da0 47 vyAKyAyAmudAharaRam) nirdaSan saMdaSan
'ASIvizavidazwAnAM SarARAM rUpamAbaBO' (BA0 dro0 9819) (BujagaH) vidaSyAsyena valmIkaM viveSa vidaSya dazwvA viSabdo neha viSezakft
'Salyasya pUrRacandrasudarSanam muKaM padmapalASAkzaM kAkErAdazwamavraRam' (BA0 strI0 234) AdazwaM vitunnam
'aBisandazwO vE svaH' (tE0 saM0 2523) aBisandazwO sandazwO saMlagnO (vftra BAge)
'mUlakenopadaMSaM BuNkte' (pA0 upadaMSastftIyAyAm 3447 sUtre vfttO) (mUlakena) upadaSya daSanEH KaRqayitvA vyaYjanamiti kftvA daSyamAnasya mUlakasya BujiM prati karaRatvAt tftIyA
'upadaMSArTaM mfgayA' (kA0 nI0 sA0 1558 ityatropADyAyanirapekzAyAm) upadaMSArTaM dIpanArTaM jAWarAgneH
